item.title: Anadrom
item.description:
Founded by my friend Luca Peric, we teamed up to work on Anadrom between September 2017 and December 2018.

Languages/Frameworks: PHP, Laravel, MySQL, HTML, CSS, JS

Luca had been working on his vision for Anadrom, a platform that could bring competitive games (eSports) coaching more accessible for both players and coaches. Apart from designing the platform architecture and features together, I managed web hosting and backend development. The platform was being developed with League of Legends in mind, but the idea was to expand to other games in the future.

Main Features

  • Group Rotation System: offer group coaching sessions once a week over a four week period.
    • Before rotating to another group, 2 weeks need to pass.
  • Coaching session calendar allowing users to join matchmaking in an explicit timeslot with similar ranked teammates
  • Play with similarly skilled players and make new friends.
  • Offer additional paid sessions for group and individual coaching.
  • Training program for skilled players to learn how to coach.
  • Custom approach to verify League of Legends account
  • Initially use Discord to host the coaching sessions
  • Token system to use for coaching sessions & seminars
